info.name: Acronis Agent Manager API
info.description:
Provides information about agents registered in Acronis Cyber Protection and their endpoints.

Guide [https://developer.acronis.com/doc/outbound/apis/api-library/agents/](https://developer.acronis.com/doc/outbound/apis/api-library/agents)

Full Reference [https://developer.acronis.com/doc/agents/v2/reference/](https://developer.acronis.com/doc/agents/v2/reference/)

Blog Post  
[https://developer.acronis.com/blog/posts/automate-acronis-agent-installations/](https://developer.acronis.com/blog/posts/automate-acronis-agent-installations/)

Copyright © 2019-2024 Acronis International GmbH. This is distributed under MIT license.
